creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
On Thu, Nov 23, 2006 at 08:52:04AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of emulators/qemu,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105761 has just been submitted.

(This is a duplicate of ports/105617:)

 This is all documented in the pkg-message:
 
..
- qemu now uses aio at least for ide dma, so if you get `Bad system call'
crashes that is because aio is not (kld)loaded.
..

 So I'd say this one can be closed as well. (btw, does query-pr.cgi
appear broken for anyone else too?
	http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=105761
says `No PRs Matched Query' for me, had to look it up at the
-ports-bugs archive...)

	Juergen
